message:
feat: Replace pure Python polyfills with Zig native extensions

- Create binascii Zig module (hex, base64, CRC32, UU encoding) — replaces
  lib/polyfills/binascii.py pure Python implementation
- Create zlib Zig module using std.compress.flate — replaces
  lib/polyfills/zlib.py pure Python DEFLATE implementation
- Wire _hashlib, _json, _collections, _functools into build (existed as
  Zig source but were never compiled)
- Fix callconv(.C) → callconv(.c) for Zig 0.15 compatibility
- Fix Py_None/Py_True/Py_False to use function call form for CPython 3.13
- Fix PyObject_AsReadBuffer (removed in 3.12) → PyObject_GetBuffer
- Remove binascii.py and zlib.py from POLYFILL_FILES since native modules
  handle them as built-in extensions

files.patch:
@@ -356,15 +356,14 @@ const PYMODE_FILES = [
 
 // Pure-Python polyfills for C extension modules unavailable in WASM.
 const POLYFILL_FILES = [
-    "binascii.py",
+    // binascii and zlib are now Zig native built-in modules (zig-modules/binascii, zig-modules/zlib)
     "socket.py",
     "_socket.py",
     "select.py",
     "ssl.py",
     "threading.py",
     "logging/__init__.py",
     "_pymode.py",
-    "zlib.py",
     "_wasi_compat.py",
     "multiprocessing/__init__.py",
     "ormsgpack.py",
